creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
In case one of the deprecated files 
- /usr/share/misc/magic.mime 
- /usr/share/misc/mime.magic.mgc 

are still on the system there is no bug (only a cosmetic issue).

IFF there is no deprecated old file on the system then I agree there is a bug.

Please try to follow ports/UPDATING 20150213 (cleanup deprecated files) and report back.
 
Will transfer the PR to portmgr Mk/Scripts is there territory
Provided patch makes the error message more readable.
